trans-unit.resname: Getting started
trans-unit.source: Getting started
trans-unit.target: Aan de slag

trans-unit.resname: Each season groups one play round with all its quizzes and candidates. The season code is the link candidates use to start a quiz — this link only works when there is an active quiz.
trans-unit.source: Each season groups one play round with all its quizzes and candidates. The season code is the link candidates use to start a quiz — this link only works when there is an active quiz.
trans-unit.target: Elk seizoen groepeert één speelronde met alle bijbehorende testen en kandidaten. De seizoenscode is de link die kandidaten gebruiken om een test te starten — deze link is alleen actief als er een actieve test is.

trans-unit.resname: How it works
trans-unit.source: How it works
trans-unit.target: Globale werkwijze

trans-unit.resname: Create a season and add candidates
trans-unit.source: Create a season and add candidates
trans-unit.target: Seizoen aanmaken en kandidaten toevoegen

trans-unit.resname: Add a quiz via XLSX or the question bank
trans-unit.source: Add a quiz via XLSX or the question bank
trans-unit.target: Test aanmaken via XLSX of de vragenbank

trans-unit.resname: Finalize and activate the quiz
trans-unit.source: Finalize and activate the quiz
trans-unit.target: Test afronden en activeren

trans-unit.resname: Let candidates take the quiz (own device or shared laptop)
trans-unit.source: Let candidates take the quiz (own device or shared laptop)
trans-unit.target: Kandidaten laten deelnemen (eigen apparaat of gedeelde laptop)

trans-unit.resname: View results and start the elimination
trans-unit.source: View results and start the elimination
trans-unit.target: Resultaten bekijken en eliminatie starten

trans-unit.resname: New season
trans-unit.source: New season
trans-unit.target: Nieuw seizoen

trans-unit.resname: A season groups all quizzes and candidates for one play round. Give the season a recognisable name — the season code is generated automatically.
trans-unit.source: A season groups all quizzes and candidates for one play round. Give the season a recognisable name — the season code is generated automatically.
trans-unit.target: Een seizoen groepeert alle testen en kandidaten voor één speelronde. Geef het seizoen een herkenbare naam — de seizoenscode wordt automatisch gegenereerd.

trans-unit.resname: After creating, add candidates and quizzes from the season page.
trans-unit.source: After creating, add candidates and quizzes from the season page.
trans-unit.target: Na het aanmaken voeg je kandidaten toe en maak je testen aan via de seizoenpagina.

trans-unit.resname: Add candidates
trans-unit.source: Add candidates
trans-unit.target: Kandidaten toevoegen

trans-unit.resname: Enter one name per line. These are the players participating in this season.
trans-unit.source: Enter one name per line. These are the players participating in this season.
trans-unit.target: Voer één naam per regel in. Dit zijn de spelers die deelnemen aan dit seizoen.

trans-unit.resname: You can always add more candidates later via the Candidates tab. Use the same spelling of names you use in the game.
trans-unit.source: You can always add more candidates later via the Candidates tab. Use the same spelling of names you use in the game.
trans-unit.target: Je kunt later altijd nog kandidaten toevoegen via het tabblad Kandidaten. Gebruik dezelfde schrijfwijze van namen die je in het spel gebruikt.

trans-unit.resname: Managing quizzes
trans-unit.source: Managing quizzes
trans-unit.target: Testen beheren

trans-unit.resname: Add a quiz from an XLSX file or create a blank one and fill it via the question bank. Then open the quiz to review and finalize it.
trans-unit.source: Add a quiz from an XLSX file or create a blank one and fill it via the question bank. Then open the quiz to review and finalize it.
trans-unit.target: Voeg een test toe vanuit een XLSX-bestand of maak een lege test aan en vul deze via de vragenbank. Open daarna de test om hem te bekijken en af te ronden.

trans-unit.resname: A quiz must be finalized before it can be activated. Only one quiz can be active at a time — this is the quiz candidates can currently take.
trans-unit.source: A quiz must be finalized before it can be activated. Only one quiz can be active at a time — this is the quiz candidates can currently take.
trans-unit.target: Een test moet eerst afgerond zijn voordat je hem kunt activeren. Slechts één test kan tegelijk actief zijn — dit is de test die kandidaten op dat moment kunnen invullen.

trans-unit.resname: Order of operations
trans-unit.source: Order of operations
trans-unit.target: Volgorde van werken

trans-unit.resname: Create the quiz (XLSX or blank)
trans-unit.source: Create the quiz (XLSX or blank)
trans-unit.target: Test aanmaken (XLSX of leeg)

trans-unit.resname: Review questions and finalize the quiz
trans-unit.source: Review questions and finalize the quiz
trans-unit.target: Vragen controleren en test afronden

trans-unit.resname: Activate the quiz
trans-unit.source: Activate the quiz
trans-unit.target: Test activeren

trans-unit.resname: Let candidates take the quiz
trans-unit.source: Let candidates take the quiz
trans-unit.target: Kandidaten laten deelnemen

trans-unit.resname: View results and prepare the elimination
trans-unit.source: View results and prepare the elimination
trans-unit.target: Resultaten bekijken en eliminatie voorbereiden

trans-unit.source: Candidates
trans-unit.target: Kandidaten

trans-unit.resname: These are the players of this season. Add all participants before starting the first quiz — candidates are automatically linked to new quizzes.
trans-unit.source: These are the players of this season. Add all participants before starting the first quiz — candidates are automatically linked to new quizzes.
trans-unit.target: Dit zijn de spelers van dit seizoen. Voeg alle deelnemers toe voordat je de eerste test start — kandidaten worden automatisch aan nieuwe testen gekoppeld.

trans-unit.resname: Names are entered freely; use the same spelling you use in the game.
trans-unit.source: Names are entered freely; use the same spelling you use in the game.
trans-unit.target: Namen zijn vrij in te voeren; gebruik dezelfde schrijfwijze die je in het spel gebruikt.

trans-unit.resname: Season settings
trans-unit.source: Season settings
trans-unit.target: Seizoensinstellingen

trans-unit.resname: Adjust the name and other settings for this season here.
trans-unit.source: Adjust the name and other settings for this season here.
trans-unit.target: Pas hier de naam en overige instellingen van dit seizoen aan.

trans-unit.resname: The season code is fixed after creation and determines the URL candidates use to log in.
trans-unit.source: The season code is fixed after creation and determines the URL candidates use to log in.
trans-unit.target: De seizoenscode staat vast na aanmaken en bepaalt de URL die kandidaten gebruiken om in te loggen.

trans-unit.resname: Question bank
trans-unit.source: Question bank
trans-unit.target: Vragenbank

trans-unit.resname: The question bank is a library of questions that can be linked to multiple quizzes. Mark a question as reusable if it may appear in multiple quizzes (e.g. 'Who is de Mol?').
trans-unit.source: The question bank is a library of questions that can be linked to multiple quizzes. Mark a question as reusable if it may appear in multiple quizzes (e.g. 'Who is de Mol?').
trans-unit.target: De vragenbank is een bibliotheek met vragen die aan meerdere testen kunnen worden gekoppeld. Markeer een vraag als herbruikbaar als deze in meerdere testen mag voorkomen (bijv. "Wie is de Mol?").

trans-unit.resname: After editing a bank question, quizzes that already contain it are not updated automatically — use the sync button next to a quiz to push the latest version.
trans-unit.source: After editing a bank question, quizzes that already contain it are not updated automatically — use the sync button next to a quiz to push the latest version.
trans-unit.target: Na het bewerken van een bankenvraag worden testen die de vraag al bevatten niet automatisch bijgewerkt — gebruik de synchronisatieknop (↻) naast een test om de meest recente versie door te zetten.

trans-unit.resname: Upload quiz via XLSX
trans-unit.source: Upload quiz via XLSX
trans-unit.target: Test uploaden via XLSX

trans-unit.resname: Upload an XLSX file with the questions for this quiz. After uploading you can review, check and finalize the quiz.
trans-unit.source: Upload an XLSX file with the questions for this quiz. After uploading you can review, check and finalize the quiz.
trans-unit.target: Upload een XLSX-bestand met de vragen voor deze test. Na het uploaden kun je de vragen bekijken, controleren en de test afronden.

trans-unit.resname: Expected format
trans-unit.source: Expected format
trans-unit.target: Verwacht formaat

trans-unit.resname: First column: question text
trans-unit.source: First column: question text
trans-unit.target: Eerste kolom: de vraagtekst

trans-unit.resname: Next columns: answer options
trans-unit.source: Next columns: answer options
trans-unit.target: Volgende kolommen: de antwoordopties

trans-unit.resname: Mark the correct answer in the spreadsheet
trans-unit.source: Mark the correct answer in the spreadsheet
trans-unit.target: Markeer het juiste antwoord via de spreadsheet

trans-unit.resname: Create blank quiz
trans-unit.source: Create blank quiz
trans-unit.target: Lege test aanmaken

trans-unit.resname: Create an empty quiz and add questions from the question bank. Useful if you reuse questions or have prepared them in the bank in advance.
trans-unit.source: Create an empty quiz and add questions from the question bank. Useful if you reuse questions or have prepared them in the bank in advance.
trans-unit.target: Maak een lege test aan en voeg vragen toe vanuit de vragenbank. Handig als je vragen hergebruikt of ze van tevoren in de bank hebt klaargezet.

trans-unit.resname: After creating, open the quiz, add questions via the Overview tab and finalize the quiz before activating it.
trans-unit.source: After creating, open the quiz, add questions via the Overview tab and finalize the quiz before activating it.
trans-unit.target: Na het aanmaken open je de test, voeg je vragen toe via het tabblad Overzicht en ronde je de test af voordat je hem activeert.

trans-unit.resname: Add question
trans-unit.source: Add question
trans-unit.target: Vraag toevoegen

trans-unit.resname: Enter the question and add at least two answer options. Mark exactly one answer as correct.
trans-unit.source: Enter the question and add at least two answer options. Mark exactly one answer as correct.
trans-unit.target: Voer de vraag in en voeg minimaal twee antwoordopties toe. Markeer precies één antwoord als correct.

trans-unit.resname: Use labels to organise questions in the question bank, for example by episode or theme.
trans-unit.source: Use labels to organise questions in the question bank, for example by episode or theme.
trans-unit.target: Gebruik labels om vragen te organiseren in de vragenbank, bijvoorbeeld per aflevering of thema.

trans-unit.resname: Mark a question as reusable if it may appear in multiple quizzes — otherwise a question can only be linked to one quiz.
trans-unit.source: Mark a question as reusable if it may appear in multiple quizzes — otherwise a question can only be linked to one quiz.
trans-unit.target: Markeer een vraag als herbruikbaar als deze in meerdere testen mag voorkomen — anders kan een vraag maar aan één test worden gekoppeld.

trans-unit.resname: Overview & finalize
trans-unit.source: Overview & finalize
trans-unit.target: Overzicht & afronden

trans-unit.resname: Questions with a red marker in the list have an error. Fix these before finalizing.
trans-unit.source: Questions with a red marker in the list have an error. Fix these before finalizing.
trans-unit.target: Vragen met een rode markering in de lijst hiernaast bevatten een fout. Herstel deze vóór het afronden.

trans-unit.resname: Finalize locks the quiz for editing and makes it ready for candidates. You can then activate it.
trans-unit.source: Finalize locks the quiz for editing and makes it ready for candidates. You can then activate it.
trans-unit.target: Afronden vergrendelt de test voor bewerking en maakt hem klaar voor kandidaten. Daarna kun je hem activeren.

trans-unit.resname: Activate makes the quiz available to candidates. Only one quiz can be active at a time — only activate the next quiz when everyone has completed the current one.
trans-unit.source: Activate makes the quiz available to candidates. Only one quiz can be active at a time — only activate the next quiz when everyone has completed the current one.
trans-unit.target: Activeren stelt de test beschikbaar aan kandidaten. Er kan maar één test tegelijk actief zijn — activeer de volgende test pas als iedereen de huidige heeft afgerond.

trans-unit.resname: Clear quiz removes all given answers and undoes finalization, so you can edit and run the quiz again.
trans-unit.source: Clear quiz removes all given answers and undoes finalization, so you can edit and run the quiz again.
trans-unit.target: Test wissen verwijdert alle gegeven antwoorden en heft het afronden op, zodat je de test opnieuw kunt bewerken en uitvoeren.

trans-unit.resname: Let candidates take the quiz
trans-unit.source: Let candidates take the quiz
trans-unit.target: Kandidaten laten deelnemen

trans-unit.resname: Candidates can take the quiz in two ways:
trans-unit.source: Candidates can take the quiz in two ways:
trans-unit.target: Kandidaten kunnen de test op twee manieren invullen:

trans-unit.resname: Option 1 — own device: Share the season code. Each candidate visits the site on their phone, enters their own name and starts the quiz.
trans-unit.source: Option 1 — own device: Share the season code. Each candidate visits the site on their phone, enters their own name and starts the quiz.
trans-unit.target: Optie 1 — eigen apparaat: Deel de seizoenscode. Elke kandidaat bezoekt de site op zijn of haar telefoon, voert de eigen naam in en start de test.

trans-unit.resname: Option 2 — shared laptop: Open the name entry page in advance on a laptop. Each candidate types their name and starts. After finishing, the next candidate can do the same.
trans-unit.source: Option 2 — shared laptop: Open the name entry page in advance on a laptop. Each candidate types their name and starts. After finishing, the next candidate can do the same.
trans-unit.target: Optie 2 — gedeelde laptop: Open de naamsinvoerpagina van tevoren op een laptop. Elke kandidaat typt zijn of haar naam en start. Na afloop kan de volgende kandidaat hetzelfde doen.

trans-unit.source: Status
trans-unit.target: Status

trans-unit.resname: Deactivate a candidate if they should not take this quiz, for example after being eliminated earlier. Deactivation is per quiz and does not affect other quizzes.
trans-unit.source: Deactivate a candidate if they should not take this quiz, for example after being eliminated earlier. Deactivation is per quiz and does not affect other quizzes.
trans-unit.target: Deactiveer een kandidaat als deze de test niet hoeft te maken, bijvoorbeeld na eerder uitgeschakeld zijn. Deactivering is per test en heeft geen invloed op andere testen.

trans-unit.resname: Fill in answers
trans-unit.source: Fill in answers
trans-unit.target: Antwoorden invullen

trans-unit.resname: Use this overview to manually assign answers — for example in case of technical problems or if someone took the quiz on paper.
trans-unit.source: Use this overview to manually assign answers — for example in case of technical problems or if someone took the quiz on paper.
trans-unit.target: Gebruik dit overzicht om handmatig antwoorden toe te wijzen — bijvoorbeeld bij technische problemen of als iemand de test op papier heeft ingevuld.

trans-unit.resname: Navigate between questions using the Previous and Next buttons. Tick the given answer per candidate and save.
trans-unit.source: Navigate between questions using the Previous and Next buttons. Tick the given answer per candidate and save.
trans-unit.target: Navigeer met de knoppen Vorige en Volgende tussen vragen. Vink per kandidaat het gegeven antwoord aan en sla op.

trans-unit.source: Results
trans-unit.target: Resultaten

trans-unit.resname: The table shows the final result per candidate sorted by score. Red rows are the candidates with the lowest score who are at risk of elimination.
trans-unit.source: The table shows the final result per candidate sorted by score. Red rows are the candidates with the lowest score who are at risk of elimination.
trans-unit.target: De tabel toont het eindresultaat per kandidaat gesorteerd op score. Rode rijen zijn de kandidaten met de laagste score die risico lopen op eliminatie.

trans-unit.resname: Corrections are added for bonus points or joker deductions (half points are possible).
trans-unit.source: Corrections are added for bonus points or joker deductions (half points are possible).
trans-unit.target: Correcties voeg je toe voor bonuspunten of jokeraftrek (halve punten zijn mogelijk).

trans-unit.resname: Penalty is a time penalty in seconds and is taken into account when scores are tied.
trans-unit.source: Penalty is a time penalty in seconds and is taken into account when scores are tied.
trans-unit.target: Straf is tijdstraf in seconden en wordt meegewogen bij gelijke score.

trans-unit.resname: Via Prepare elimination you set the screen colours manually and start the elimination sequence.
trans-unit.source: Via Prepare elimination you set the screen colours manually and start the elimination sequence.
trans-unit.target: Via Eliminatie voorbereiden stel je de schermkleuren handmatig in en start je de eliminatiereeks.

trans-unit.resname: Prepare elimination
trans-unit.source: Prepare elimination
trans-unit.target: Eliminatie voorbereiden

trans-unit.resname: Choose a colour for each candidate: green means safe, red means eliminated.
trans-unit.source: Choose a colour for each candidate: green means safe, red means eliminated.
trans-unit.target: Kies voor elke kandidaat een kleur: groen betekent veilig, rood betekent geëlimineerd.

trans-unit.resname: Use Save and start to play the elimination immediately, or save first and start later via the Results tab.
trans-unit.source: Use Save and start to play the elimination immediately, or save first and start later via the Results tab.
trans-unit.target: Gebruik Opslaan en starten om de eliminatie direct af te spelen, of sla eerst op en start later via het tabblad Resultaten.
